Quality Education.reason: Focus on philosophical education aligns with Target 4.7 ('knowledge and skills for sustainable development').
The course is an example of tertiary education (Target 4.3) and aims to '爲哲學系教育補充豐富的內涵' (enrich the education of the philosophy department).
evidence: 爲哲學系教育補充豐富的內涵

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course objective to '嘗試各種AI生成PPT的工具' (try various AI tools) promotes the use of modern information and communications technology (Target 9.c).

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The instruction to '務必使用正版書籍' (use legitimate books) infers a promotion of responsible consumption of intellectual products, aligning with sustainable lifestyle awareness (Target 12.8).
evidence: 維護智慧財產權，務必使用正版書籍。

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course promotes the rule of law (Target 16.3) by explicitly requiring students to '維護智慧財產權' (Respect Copyright) and use legitimate books.
evidence: 維護智慧財產權，務必使用正版書籍。
